mapper.select: select * FROM notice where prj_id = #{prjId} ORDER BY is_fixed DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: insert into notice( id, prj_id, mem_id, title, description, is_fixed ) values( news_seq.nextval, #{prjId}, #{memId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{isFixed} )
mapper.update: update notice set prj_id = #{prjId}, mem_id = #{memId}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, is_fixed = #{isFixed} where id = #{id}
